untranslatable_reason: Signal requires custom rolling mean momentum calculation over resampled tick data with dynamic window sizing. The exact momentum computation (rolling mean of log returns over [THRESHOLD_NEEDED]-bar window) is not available as a pre-calculated indicator in the allowed list. Additionally, [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] placeholders indicate missing parameter specifications that cannot be resolved. The signal also requires explicit tracking of momentum sign transitions and zero-crossings, which requires state management beyond simple indicator comparisons.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using log_returns sign as proxy for momentum direction, but this loses the rolling mean smoothing and window-based logic central to the signal. The resample_interval and momentum_lookback_bars parameters must be specified numerically before this signal can be properly implemented. Consider implementing custom momentum indicator in backtest engine or providing concrete parameter values.
